title: Date Night Disaster
theme: Romance collapses under confident, terrible decisions.

nodes.prompt: Halfway through your date, the restaurant lights cut out and a violinist keeps playing.
nodes.resultText: The room decides how hard to commit to the accidental drama.

choices.label: Propose as a bit
choices.resultText: The room commits to the biggest possible joke and instantly makes it everyone's problem.

choices.label: Blame the moon
choices.resultText: You hand full responsibility to the night sky and hope charisma does the rest.

choices.label: Steal dessert first
choices.resultText: Romance takes a back seat to lava cake theft and a wildly confident spoon plan.

nodes.prompt: The next table starts cheering and someone offers to livestream the moment.

choices.label: Commit to the speech
choices.resultText: The fake proposal gets so detailed that nobody can tell when the bit ended.

choices.label: Crowdfund the ring
choices.resultText: Nothing kills the mood faster than turning romance into a live fundraiser.

nodes.prompt: Your date asks whether this line works often for you.
nodes.resultText: The room chooses between charm failure and honesty failure.

choices.label: Say it never misses
choices.resultText: You double down with impossible confidence and the date becomes a legend by force.

choices.label: Pivot into astrology
choices.resultText: The room calls an audible into zodiac discourse and the evening never recovers.

nodes.prompt: The waiter catches you holding two spoons and an entire lava cake.
nodes.resultText: The room turns dessert theft into relationship lore.

choices.label: Offer a bite
choices.resultText: Sharing the stolen cake somehow reads as intimate enough to become relationship canon.

choices.label: Claim emotional support cake
choices.resultText: The legal defense for dessert theft is so bad it ends the date on contact.

nodes.prompt: You leave the restaurant engaged to a joke that nobody can safely undo.
The date ends with a free tiramisu and a permanent block on every app.
